title: To require the Secretary of the Treasury to designate certain covered organizations as Foreign Financial Threat Organizations, and for other purposes.
stage_label: Referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, and in addition to the Committees on Financial Services, and Energy and Co
last_action_text: Referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, and in addition to the Committees on Financial Services, and Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case
